description_long: This is a modern bed with a rectangular frame and a clean, minimalist design. The bed features a prominent headboard and a lower footboard, both with flat, panel-like surfaces. The mattress is visible and appears to be covered with a light-colored sheet that has subtle, cloudy patterns. The frame is constructed from what appears to be painted wood or a wood-like material, giving it a sturdy and solid appearance. The bed sits low to the ground, with a platform-style base that supports the mattress evenly across its length. The overall color palette is neutral, dominated by shades of white and gray, making it suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A modern, low-profile bed with a panel headboard and footboard, featuring a light, cloud-patterned sheet and a sturdy, white frame.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the headboard on the right, and the mattress with a light, cloudy pattern.
description_view_1: Foot-end view highlighting the flat, rectangular footboard and the width of the bed frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the headboard on the left, showing the bed's length and the mattress surface.
description_view_3: Head-on view from the headboard side, displaying the height and width of the headboard and the full mattress surface.
